Interface IRPCXform2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a RPC transform.

[Guid("35F17F4A-45EE-4462-BC0A-BA9FCD17EFFC")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRPCXform2 : IRPCXform, IGeodataXform
